name: Pork Chops in Radish Sauce
keywords: tex-mex meats pork sauces main dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork chops to be about 1/2-inch thick.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
4. Sear pork chops until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove pork chops from the pan and set aside.
6. In the same pan, sauté onions in vegetable oil until softened.
7. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they begin to break down.
8. Stir in orange juice, lime juice, cilantro, salt, pepper, and additional oil.
9. Mix well and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
10. Combine cooked rice with the radishes and relish mixture.
11. Serve pork chops topped with the radish and cilantro relish.
